title: Cryptantha dichita
taxonomy: Cryptantha dichita belongs to the family Boraginaceae, commonly known as the borage family. Within this family, it is classified as a genus of flowering plants in the tribe Heliotideae. The species is further classified as a member of the genus Cryptantha, which comprises approximately 200 species of flowering plants. Cryptantha dichita is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. Its classification reflects its relationships with other flowering plants in the region.
